identity.name: Money Lent Tracker
identity.metaphor: Liquid Glass Ledger - A futuristic, transparent view of personal debts.

glass.liquid: bg-gradient-to-br from-white/10 to-transparent backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-l border-white/20 shadow-[0_8px_32px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.36)]

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/5 text-muted-foreground hover:text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 backdrop-blur-sm

modals.desktop: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 sm:rounded-3xl shadow-2xl
modals.mobile: bottom-sheet rounded-t-3xl border-t border-white/10 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-xl

visual_enhancers.noise: fixed inset-0 opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none z-50 mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]
glow_orbs: absolute top-[-10%] left-[-10%] w-[40vw] h-[40vw] bg-indigo-600/20 rounded-full blur-[100px]
absolute bottom-[-10%] right-[-10%] w-[30vw] h-[30vw] bg-purple-600/20 rounded-full blur-[100px]

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Ensure Tailwind 'dark' mode is enabled in config and applied to the html/body tag.
2. Base Styles: Apply a global dark background (#020408) to the body. Do not use default white.
3. Glass Effect: Create a reusable 'GlassCard' component that uses the 'liquid' class defined in the design system. This should be the default container for all content.
4. Dashboard: Implement the dashboard using a Bento Grid layout. Use the 'numbers' font (JetBrains Mono) for all currency values.
5. Forms: All inputs must use the transparent glass style. No solid white backgrounds for inputs.
6. Mobile: On mobile, the 'Add Loan' and 'Record Payment' forms should appear as bottom sheets (Drawers) with a glass backdrop.
7. Testing: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
8. Universal Rule: Never use pure black (#000000) for cards. Use very dark grey/blue with transparency.
9. Animation: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and list item entrance animations.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Do not center align the app container.
